data.title: Dow Jones closes at record high, S&P 500 at intraday high before Christmas, with Palantir, Tesla, Google & Nvidia in buy areas.
data.description: The Dow Jones achieved a new record closing high, while the S&P 500 reached an intraday peak as Christmas approached. Stocks such as Palantir, Tesla, Google, and Nvidia are currently in attractive buy zones. Following the market holiday, Dow Jones Futures are anticipated to continue their positive momentum, with the S&P 500 sustaining its elevated levels.
If you’re planning to buy a laptop, buy one right now! Due to surging CPU and memory prices, OEMs are reportedly considering raising prices on premium laptops by as much as 30%.

data.title: CGTN article discusses China's continuous anti-corruption efforts, emphasizing Party self-governance and serving the people.
data.description: An article recently published by CGTN details China's current anti-corruption initiative. It discusses the unique methods employed by China, contrasting them with Western practices, underscoring the Party's commitment to self-regulation, and stressing the campaign's aim to benefit the populace. The report, released on December 25, 2025, provides insights into a nationwide effort that has seen a significant number of officials investigated and disciplined, reflecting the government's determination to root out corruption for the people's welfare.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins debut NFT characters at Las Vegas Sphere for Christmas, owned by Luca Netz. Live display on Xmas Eve.
data.description: On Christmas Eve, an animated display from Luca Netz's non-fungible token project was showcased on the external screens of Sphere. The project's visibility reached a wide audience due to this public display.

data.title: Alphamin reports fatality at Mpama South underground mine in DR Congo. Incident occurred while connecting blasting wires, resulting in employee fatality. Mining activities temporarily suspended, investigation ongoing. Condolences to the deceased's family and colleagues. Contact for more information.
data.description: An employee at Alphamin Resources Corp's subsidiary, Alphamin Bisie Mining S.A., was fatally injured in an incident at the Mpama South underground mine in the Democratic Republic of the Congo on December 24, 2025. The incident occurred while the employee was connecting blasting wires, resulting in an unexpected detonation and fatal injuries. The company expressed deep regret and extended condolences to the family, friends, and colleagues of the deceased. Mining activities were temporarily suspended but have since resumed after a thorough investigation. The safety of employees remains a top priority for the company.

data.title: Fastest-growing stablecoins in 2025: 7 from Tether to Trump-backed USD1. Stablecoin supply soared to $314B, but dominance varies.
data.description: In 2025, the collective supply of stablecoins skyrocketed to a staggering $314 billion. However, focusing solely on market capitalization does not provide the complete picture. The significant growth in stablecoin supply highlighted a particular group that was truly dominant in the market.

data.title: Crypto exchanges are embracing prediction markets. Crypto.com's market maker raises concerns as Coinbase focuses on growth.
data.description: As prediction markets gain traction in the cryptocurrency industry, Crypto.com's internal market maker has raised concerns about fairness, while Coinbase is intensifying its focus on expansion. This trend signifies a shift towards mainstream acceptance of prediction markets within the crypto space. With Crypto.com's market maker being scrutinized for potential bias issues and Coinbase demonstrating a strong commitment to growth, the growing popularity of prediction markets in the cryptocurrency sector is becoming more evident. This development showcases the increasing integration of prediction markets into the broader crypto landscape, underscoring their rising significance as key indicators of market trends.

data.title: Liquidity, not headlines, dictates Bitcoin and altcoin prices. ETFs, stablecoins, and on-chain data reveal true price drivers.
data.description: The crypto market is highly influenced by headlines, yet its longevity is determined by liquidity. Analysis of data from Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs), stablecoins, and on-chain transactions reveals the true underlying factors dictating price movements.

data.title: Bitcoin mining stocks, including IREN, CISR, RIOT, and CLSK, have delivered impressive YTD gains in 2025. IREN saw +328.41%.IREN transitioned to high-performance data centers, securing a $9.7 billion GPU cloud contract with Microsoft. Analysts have a consensus price target of $55.73.
data.description: This article discusses the potential investment opportunity in Bitcoin mining stocks during the holiday season. It highlights the significant gains made by companies such as IREN Ltd. (+328.41%), Cipher Mining Inc. (+242.89%), Riot Platforms Inc. (+33.89%), and CleanSpark Inc. (+24.97%) this year. IREN has seen a rise in share price due to its transition to high-performance data centers for AI and GPU cloud services, with notable deals including a $9.7 billion contract with Microsoft. Analysts predict a price target of $55.73 for IREN, with Cantor Fitzgerald estimating a high of $136. The stock's Momentum is rated at 98.39/100. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: World Liberty Financial's stablecoin $USD1 surpasses $3 billion in market cap, reaching over $3.07 billion supply.
data.description: World Liberty Financial (WLFI) recently revealed that its leading digital dollar stablecoin, USD1, has surpassed a circulating supply milestone, surpassing $3 billion. Today, as reported by Coinmarketcap.com, the supply of USD1 has risen to over $3.07 billion. WLFI's Co-founder and CEO, Zach Witkoff, stated that the motivation behind launching USD1 was to provide traditional institutions with a trustworthy crypto-native tool to engage with the potential of DeFi. However, the incredible demand for USD1 has extended well beyond initial expectations.

data.title: NVIDIA to license AI chip tech from Groq, hiring top execs in partial takeover move. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: Nvidia has made a strategic move by acquiring key technology from the AI chip startup Groq and recruiting some of their top talent. This arrangement falls short of a complete takeover but signifies a significant step in that direction. The collaboration involves the licensing of essential AI chip technology, showcasing Nvidia's commitment to enhancing its capabilities in this sector. The move has attracted attention for its potential to propel Nvidia's position in the market.

data.title: Dow Jones hits record close, S&P 500 at intraday high before Christmas. Palantir, Tesla, Google, Nvidia in buy zones.
data.description: The Dow Jones achieved a new record closing high while the S&P 500 reached a peak during trading leading up to the Christmas holiday. Investors are eyeing potential buying opportunities for Palantir, Tesla, Google, and Nvidia as they exhibit strong performance. Market activities are anticipated to pause for Christmas following the Dow Jones hitting fresh highs.

data.title: Canton token surges 27% as DTCC reveals plans to tokenize US Treasurys, showing increasing institutional support for tokenized assets.
data.description: The decision by DTCC to incorporate US Treasurys on the blockchain signifies the increasing support from institutions for digitizing real-world assets. This move underscores a trend towards digitizing traditional assets, with significant interest and participation from institutional investors.

During a routine training session in East China’s Suzhou City, Jiangsu Province, a dragon boat team spotted a kitten trapped by the riverbank. Without hesitation, the team turned back and used their paddles to carefully lift the scared little kitten to safety.
